scripts.build: npm run generate:contracts && tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.json && vite build
scripts.test:contracts: npm run generate:contracts && git diff --exit-code -- src/generated/api-schemas.json src/generated/api-types.ts
scripts.test:unit: tsx tests/geometry.test.ts && tsx tests/playback.test.ts && tsx tests/presentation.test.ts && tsx tests/workbenchState.test.ts
scripts.test:acceptance: npm run test:contracts && npm run test:fixtures && npm run test:unit && npm run test:e2e
